title: Nitromors Craftsman Paint Stripper, Varnish & Lacquer Remover, Perfect for Fine Carvings & Mouldings, 750 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

PAINT STRIPPER and REMOVER: for paint varnish and laquers. For use on Wood Metal and Concerete. Perfect for fine furniture, intricate mouldings and carvings due to its thin consistency. Nitromors Crafstmasn Paint Stripper and Varnish Remover is available in 375ml, 500ml (aerosol), 750ml, 2L
THIN APPLICATION: 1-2mm for intricate mouldings and crevices. Nitromors Craftsmans Paint, Varnish and Lacquer Remover will transform doors, cast iron fireplaces and staircases in minutes
COVERAGE: 750ml covers up to 2m². FAST ACTING dichloromethane free formula

Nitromors was established in the 1930’s and is the market leader in paint and varnish stripper, trusted by generations and asked for by name from DIY customers to craftsmen and restorers. Our specialist formulations are the strongest and fastest paint & varnish removers on the market. With exceptionally fast blistering time, Nitromors strips up to twice the number of paint layers per application compared to other similar products on the market
